hero.name: Adewale Samson Adeagbo
hero.statement: 15 years in Nigerian classrooms. 12 deployed ML projects. I leveraged AI to build a live exam platform on an Android tablet.

about.p1: For over 15 years, I have taught across every level — Nursery, Primary, and Secondary school. Currently in secondary school. Mathematics, Further Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science. Fifteen years of watching exactly where understanding breaks down.
about.p2: I did not build CBT Pro because I learned HTML. I built it because I think clearly as a data scientist and leveraged AI to operate in an unfamiliar field. No laptop. Android tablet. Acode. Zero budget. This same method built this portfolio and the HMG Concepts website.
about.p3: My formal data science journey accelerated through 3MTT in 2025. Since then: 12 projects, 7 industries, 3 active learning programmes (DeepTech_Ready DSN × 3MTT × Google.org, WorldQuant University, Kodecamp Cohort 6), IBM SkillsBuild Ambassador.
about.quote: I did not wait to become a developer. I used clear thinking and AI leverage to build the tools my students needed. That working method is the real skill.

projects.name: CBT Pro (CBT.ng)
projects.problem: Nigerian teachers needed a free, reliable digital exam tool.
projects.metric: CSV upload · timed exams · anti-cheat · 4-tab analytics

projects.name: Bank Customer Churn Prediction
projects.problem: Identify customers at risk of leaving before they do.

projects.name: Income Level Prediction
projects.problem: Predict income bracket for financial inclusion.

projects.name: TruthLens — Fake News Detector
projects.problem: Detect misinformation in news articles automatically.

projects.name: SwiftChain Delivery Delay
projects.problem: Predict delivery delay category before dispatch.

projects.name: NeuroWell — Burnout Predictor
projects.problem: Predict employee burnout rate before productivity collapses.

projects.name: Student At-Risk Predictor
projects.problem: Identify students likely to fail before exam season.
projects.metric: Random Forest · SHAP · Synthetic Nigerian Data

projects.name: Student Performance Tracker v3
projects.problem: Give teachers a real data picture of their class.

projects.name: Student Study Plan Generator
projects.problem: Generate personalised revision schedules based on weak areas.

projects.name: CBT Question Bank Manager
projects.problem: Build, organise, and reuse CBT question sets across subjects and years.

journey.title: Three Active Programmes Running Simultaneously
journey.desc: DeepTech_Ready DSML Cohort 3, WorldQuant University Applied Data Science Lab, and Kodecamp Cohort 6 ML Core Track — all running in parallel while still teaching every week.

journey.title: IBM SkillsBuild Hub Ambassador — Cohort 4
journey.desc: Selected to champion digital literacy and AI fluency across Nigerian communities.

journey.title: 12 Projects Deployed — ML, NLP, EdTech, Analytics
journey.desc: From notebooks to 12 live Streamlit apps across 7 industries.

journey.title: 3MTT Programme — Data Science Track
journey.desc: The spark that changed everything. My 15 years of problem-solving instincts got a technical language.

journey.title: CBT Pro — First Live Deployment with Real Students
journey.desc: Built on Android tablet using Acode + AI leverage. Not web development training — clear thinking.

journey.title: B.Sc.(Ed) Computer Science Education
journey.desc: Degree earned as an adult to formally bridge pedagogy and technology.

journey.title: Founded HMG Concepts
journey.desc: From individual tutoring to a structured educational organisation with four subsidiaries.

journey.title: Piano & Music Certificate
journey.desc: Where pattern recognition began. Music theory and data science share more than people think.

journey.title: First Classroom — Chrisville Schools
journey.desc: JSS class. Chalk. A blackboard. Fifteen years later, still in the classroom every week.

testimonials.text: Mr Adewale does not just teach you how to solve the problem — he teaches you how to think. My Further Mathematics went from D7 to B2 in one term. He actually cares whether you understand.
testimonials.name: Tolu F.

testimonials.text: CBT Pro is genuinely different. My students completed their mock exams without a single technical issue. That alone is remarkable for a free Nigerian tool.
testimonials.name: Adeyemi O.

testimonials.text: What stands out in Adewale's portfolio is not the project count — it is the honesty. He documents the data leakage fix, the real metrics. That is what a serious data scientist looks like.
testimonials.name: Kunle N.

youtube.name: HMG Concepts
youtube.desc: The classroom, extended beyond the school walls. Data science walkthroughs, EdTech builds in public, WAEC/JAMB prep — all free.

contact.looking: Actively seeking data science, ML, or data analyst roles. Open to EdTech collaborations and school partnerships for CBT Pro. Available for STEM tutoring. Open to remote globally.
